assertions.text: Output contains a structured verification report with pass/fail indicators for each acceptance criterion
Report verifies getAdminStats query exists in schema.graphql
Report verifies AdminStats type has all 6 required fields (totalUsers, totalThreads, pendingReports, activeUsersDaily, newUsersDaily, newThreadsDaily)
Report verifies AppSync resolver function files exist in terraform/functions/
Report verifies admin group check in resolver code
Report verifies types/adminStats.ts exists with correct interface
Report verifies terraform modules are wired in main.tf (function + pipeline resolver modules)
All 9 acceptance criteria from the PRD are addressed in the report
Report ends with a clear overall PASS/FAIL verdict
